revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Miwa and Yamato Faith]]
[[WP:AES|←]]Removed redirect to [[Template:Miwa and Yamato Faith]]
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/sandbox]] to [[Template:Isonokami Faith]]
Convert [[Ikagashikome]] to wikilink (The bot operation is completed 35% in total)
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Isonokami Faith | title = Isonokami Faith | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Isonokami.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Futsu-no-mitama|ja|布都御魂}} * [[Nigihayahi]]
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Isonokami Shrine]]
|group3= Clan |list3= * [[Mononobe clan]]
|group6 = Misc |list6 = * {{ill|Prince Inishiki|ja|五十瓊敷入彦命}} * ''{{ill|Tokusa-no-Kandakara|ja|十種神宝}}'' * ''{{ill|Kokitsunemaru|ja|小狐丸}}'', an ''[[ōdachi]]'' forged by {{ill|Sanjō Munechika|it|Munechika|ja|三条宗近}} * {{ill|Chinkon-sai|ja|鎮魂祭}} * {{ill|Tsukinami-no-matsuri|ja|月次祭}}
|group5= People |list5= * [[Isonokami no Maro]] * [[Mononobe no Okoshi]] * [[Mononobe no Arakabi]] * [[Mononobe no Moriya]] * [[Ikagashikome]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 10 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Isonokami_Faith]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Isonokami Faith | title = Isonokami Faith | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Isonokami.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Futsu-no-mitama|ja|布都御魂}} * [[Nigihayahi]]
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Isonokami Shrine]]

|group5= People |list5= * [[Isonokami no Maro]] * [[Mononobe no Okoshi]] * [[Mononobe no Arakabi]] * [[Mononobe no Moriya]] * [[Ikagashikome]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Tsukinami-no-matsuri" to "Tsukinami-no-Matsuri"
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "|月次祭}}" to "|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri}}"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Text replacement - "五十瓊敷入彦命|" to "五十瓊敷入彦命|1=Itsuninomikoto|2=ja|3=五十瓊敷入彦命|"
Text replacement - "Itsuninomikoto" to "Prince Inishikiirihiko"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: fix redirect [[Isonokami Shrine]] → [[Isonokami Jingu]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125506968)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
